query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_registros_a_remover
FROM interacoes i
WHERE DATE(i.createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  AND i.id NOT IN (
    SELECT MIN(i2.id)
    FROM interacoes i2
    WHERE DATE(i2.createdAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    GROUP BY i2.leadId, i2.corretorId, i2.tipo, DATE(i2.createdAt)
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM interacoes i3
    WHERE i3.leadId = i.leadId
      AND i3.corretorId = i.corretorId
      AND i3.tipo = i.tipo
      AND DATE(i3.createdAt) = DATE(i.createdAt)
      AND i3.id < i.id
      AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, i3.createdAt, i.createdAt) < 60
  );

    GROUP BY i2.leadId, i2.corretorId, i2.tipo, DATE(i2.createdAt)
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM interacoes i3
    WHERE i3.leadId = i.leadId
      AND i3.corretorId = i.corretorId
      AND i3.tipo = i.tipo
      AND DATE(i3.createdAt) = DATE(i.createdAt)
      AND i3.id < i.id
      AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, i3.createdAt, i.createdAt) < 60
  );
